en: Moses assembled all the congregation of the people of Israel and said to them, "These are the things that the LORD has commanded you to do.
zh: 摩西召集了以色列全體會眾，對他們說：“這就是耶和華吩咐的話，要你們遵行。

en: Six days work shall be done, but on the seventh day you shall have a Sabbath of solemn rest, holy to the LORD. Whoever does any work on it shall be put to death.
zh: 六日要工作，但第七日是你們的聖日，要歸耶和華為休息的安息日。凡是在這日工作的，必須把他處死。

en: You shall kindle no fire in all your dwelling places on the Sabbath day."
zh: 在安息日，不可在你們任何的住處生火。”

en: Moses said to all the congregation of the people of Israel, "This is the thing that the LORD has commanded.
zh: 摩西告訴以色列全體會眾說：“耶和華吩咐的是這樣，他說：

en: Take from among you a contribution to the LORD. Whoever is of a generous heart, let him bring the LORD's contribution: gold, silver, and bronze;
zh: ‘你們要從你們中間拿禮物來給耶和華，凡是甘心樂意的，都可以把耶和華的禮物帶來，就是金、銀、銅、

en: blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen; goats' hair,
zh: 藍色紫色朱紅色線、細麻、山羊毛、

en: tanned rams' skins, and goatskins; acacia wood,
zh: 染紅的公羊皮、海狗皮、皂莢木、

en: oil for the light, spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense,
zh: 燈油，以及作膏油和芬芳的香的香料、

en: and onyx stones and stones for setting, for the ephod and for the breastpiece.
zh: 紅瑪瑙寶石，以及可以鑲嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的寶石。

en: "Let every skillful craftsman among you come and make all that the LORD has commanded:
zh: “‘你們中間凡是心裡有智慧的都要來，做耶和華吩咐的一切，

en: the tabernacle, its tent and its covering, its hooks and its frames, its bars, its pillars, and its bases;
zh: 就是做帳幕、帳幕的棚罩、帳幕的蓋、鉤子、木板、橫閂、柱子、帳幕的座、

en: the ark with its poles, the mercy seat, and the veil of the screen;
zh: 櫃、櫃槓、施恩座、遮蓋至聖所的幔子、

en: the table with its poles and all its utensils, and the bread of the Presence;
zh: 桌子、桌子的槓、桌子的一切器具、陳設餅、

en: the lampstand also for the light, with its utensils and its lamps, and the oil for the light;
zh: 燈臺、燈臺的器具、燈盞、燈油、

en: and the altar of incense, with its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;
zh: 香壇、香壇的槓、膏油、芬芳的香、帳幕門口的門簾、

en: the altar of burnt offering, with its grating of bronze, its poles, and all its utensils, the basin and its stand;
zh: 燔祭壇、壇的銅網、壇槓、壇的一切器具、洗濯盆、盆座、

en: the hangings of the court, its pillars and its bases, and the screen for the gate of the court;
zh: 院子的帷子、帷子的柱子、帷子的座、院子的門簾、

en: the pegs of the tabernacle and the pegs of the court, and their cords;
zh: 帳幕的釘子、院子的釘子，以及這兩處的繩子、

en: the finely worked garments for ministering in the Holy Place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, for their service as priests."
zh: 在聖所供職用的彩衣、祭司亞倫的聖衣和他兒子供祭司職用的衣服。’”

en: Then all the congregation of the people of Israel departed from the presence of Moses.
zh: 以色列全體會眾從摩西面前離去了。

en: And they came, everyone whose heart stirred him, and everyone whose spirit moved him, and brought the LORD's contribution to be used for the tent of meeting, and for all its service, and for the holy garments.
zh: 凡是心裡受感、靈裡樂意的，都來了；他們把耶和華的禮物都帶來了，用作會幕的工程和會幕中的一切使用，又用來做聖衣。

en: So they came, both men and women. All who were of a willing heart brought brooches and earrings and signet rings and armlets, all sorts of gold objects, every man dedicating an offering of gold to the LORD.
zh: 凡是甘心樂意的，不論男女，都來了，把金針、耳環、戒指、手釧和各樣的金器都送來。他們各人都把金子作禮物呈獻給耶和華。

en: And every one who possessed blue or purple or scarlet yarns or fine linen or goats' hair or tanned rams' skins or goatskins brought them.
zh: 凡是有藍色紫色朱紅色線、細麻、山羊毛、染紅的公羊皮、海狗皮的，都送了來。

en: Everyone who could make a contribution of silver or bronze brought it as the LORD's contribution. And every one who possessed acacia wood of any use in the work brought it.
zh: 凡是奉獻銀子和銅為禮物的，都帶了來作耶和華的禮物；凡是有皂莢木可以用作工程上任何使用的，都帶了來。

en: And every skillful woman spun with her hands, and they all brought what they had spun in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen.
zh: 凡是心中有智慧的婦女都親手紡織，把所紡的藍色紫色朱紅色線都帶了來。

en: All the women whose hearts stirred them to use their skill spun the goats' hair.
zh: 凡是有心意又有智慧的婦女，都紡山羊毛。

en: And the leaders brought onyx stones and stones to be set, for the ephod and for the breastpiece,
zh: 首領把紅瑪瑙寶石，以及可以鑲嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的寶石都帶了來；

en: and spices and oil for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the fragrant incense.
zh: 又帶來了香料、點燈用的油、膏油、芬芳的香。

en: All the men and women, the people of Israel, whose heart moved them to bring anything for the work that the LORD had commanded by Moses to be done brought it as a freewill offering to the LORD.
zh: 以色列人無論男女，凡是甘心樂意為作耶和華藉摩西吩咐的一切工程的，都把自願奉獻的禮物帶了來獻給耶和華。

en: Then Moses said to the people of Israel, "See, the LORD has called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah;
zh: 摩西對以色列人說：“看哪，猶大支派中戶珥的孫子、烏利的兒子比撒列，耶和華已經提名召他，

en: and he has filled him with the Spirit of God, with skill, with intelligence, with knowledge, and with all craftsmanship,
zh: 又用 神的靈充滿他，使他有智慧，有聰明，有知識，有作一切巧工的技能。

en: to devise artistic designs, to work in gold and silver and bronze,
zh: 能巧設圖案，用金、銀、銅製造各物；

en: in cutting stones for setting, and in carving wood, for work in every skilled craft.
zh: 又能雕刻寶石，用來鑲嵌；又能雕刻木頭，用來製造各種巧工。

en: And he has inspired him to teach, both him and Oholiab the son of Ahisamach of the tribe of Dan.
zh: 耶和華又賜給他和但支派中亞希撒抹的兒子亞何利亞伯，心裡有教導人的恩賜。

en: He has filled them with skill to do every sort of work done by an engraver or by a designer or by an embroiderer in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, or by a weaver- by any sort of workman or skilled designer.
zh: 耶和華又用智慧充滿他們的心，使他們能作各種工作，雕刻的工，設圖案的工，用藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻刺繡的工，以及編織的工。他們能作各種工程，也能巧設圖案。”
